title: set_subscription enforces SQLite-compatible datetime format to prevent silent expiry bugs
description: relay/src/store.rs:236-247: The method requires a DateTime<Utc> parameter and formats it internally as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, not as raw string. This prevents the CLAUDE.md §9 invariant violation: RFC 3339 format (with 'T' separator) would compare as > datetime('now') on the same calendar day (position 10: 0x54 > 0x20), making expired subscriptions appear active. The format-enforcing approach compiles safely; the string-accepting alternative looks correct in tests until it silently corrupts production subscription gating.
